title: DA leads local results with Knysna only exception
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the Garden...
bodyText:
Breaking News
                            Update

GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the Garden Route District Municipality and Dr Beyers Naude Local Municipality (home of the Graaff-Reinet Advertiser) the DA is in the lead in the early stages of the vote counting process.

The only exception being the Knysna municipal area where the ANC is leading.

The top three parties at this stage are definitely the DA, ANC and PA, with VF Plus making its mark in Hessequa.


> At 11:34 the results were as follows:


- Bitou: DA 47,74% ANC 32,56% PA 8,36%
- Knysna: ANC 54,11% DA 21,37% PA 12,23%
- George: DA 61,72% PA 19,00% ANC 7,82%
- Mossel Bay: DA 52,26% PA 29,42% ANC 7,72%
- Oudtshoorn: DA 40,47% PA 29,94% ANC 18,61%
- Prince Albert: DA 45,27% PA 40,00% ANC 10,52%
- Kannaland (Ladismith): DA 45,08% PA 27,96% ANC 16,95%
- Hessequa: DA 73,49% VF PLUS 8,23% PA 6,87% ANC 6,45%
- Graaff-Reinet: DA 40,52% ANC 39,46% PA 10,76%

See the live election results on our website, by clicking on the following link: CLICK HERE

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
